emails.subject: Dow Jones Reports
emails.body: Dow Jones Reports Here you are, ladies. As per our prior discussion, these are the Dow Jones index price reports I promised to send you. Let me know how this works for you. If there are no questions, comments, or concerns, I'll forward the e-mails to you each week on Tuesday afternoon as soon as I receive them. And thanks for encouraging Willie Harrell to automate the pub-posting system. Sounds pretty logical to me! Kate Forwarded by Kate Symes/PDX/ECT on 02/20/2001 04:21 PM djenergy <djenergy@dowjones.com> on 02/20/2001 04:19:52 PM
